nl_statement: If f : E → ℝ is differentiable and ∇f is L-Lipschitz, then f(y) ≤ f(x) + ⟨∇f(x), y-x⟩ + (L/2)‖y-x‖² for all x,y ∈ E.
lean_signature: theorem descent_lemma_v2 {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E] {f : E → ℝ} {L : NNReal} (hf : Differentiable ℝ f) (hL : LipschitzWith L (fun z => gradient f z)) (x y : E) : f y ≤ f x + ⟪gradient f x, y - x⟫_ℝ + (L : ℝ) / 2 * ‖y - x‖^2
back_translation: For E a real inner product space that is complete, f differentiable, gradient f L-Lipschitz, x y in E: f(y) ≤ f(x) + ⟨gradient f x, y - x⟩ + L/2 * ‖y - x‖²
note: signature added CompleteSpace E (required for Mathlib's `gradient` definition to type-check)

nl_statement: If f satisfies f(a·x + b·y) ≤ a·f(x) + b·f(y) - (m/2)·a·b·‖x-y‖^2 for every convex combination on a convex set s, then StrongConvexOn s m f.
lean_signature: theorem strongly_convex_on_def {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] {s : Set E} {f : E → ℝ} {m : ℝ} (hs : Convex ℝ s) (hfun : ∀ ⦃x⦄, x ∈ s → ∀ ⦃y⦄, y ∈ s → ∀ ⦃a⦄, 0 ≤ a → ∀ ⦃b⦄, 0 ≤ b → a + b = 1 → f (a • x + b • y) ≤ a * f x + b * f y - m / 2 * a * b * ‖x - y‖ ^ 2) : StrongConvexOn s m f

nl_statement: If f has gradient f' everywhere and attains its minimum at xm on univ, then f'(xm) = 0.
lean_signature: theorem first_order_unconstrained {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E] {xm : E} {f : E → ℝ} {f' : E → E} (hf : ∀ x : E, HasGradientAt f (f' x) x) (min : IsMinOn f Set.univ xm) (_hfc : ContinuousOn f' Set.univ) : f' xm = 0
route: direct-mathlib via IsLocalMin.fderiv_eq_zero (vs optlib's contradiction route)

nl_statement: If f' is Lipschitz with constant l and f' is the Frechet derivative of f, then f y ≤ f x + (f' x)(y - x) + l/2 * ‖y - x‖^2.
lean_signature: theorem lipschitz_continuous_upper_bound {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace ℝ E] {f : E → ℝ} {f' : E → (E →L[ℝ] ℝ)} {l : NNReal} (hd : ∀ x : E, HasFDerivAt f (f' x) x) (hl : LipschitzWith l f') : ∀ (x y : E), f y ≤ f x + (f' x) (y - x) + l / 2 * ‖y - x‖ ^ 2

nl_statement: Gradient form: HasGradientAt + LipschitzWith → quadratic upper bound with inner product.
lean_signature: theorem descent_lemma_gradient_form {E} [NACG] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E] {f : E → ℝ} {f' : E → E} {l : NNReal} (h₁ : ∀ x : E, HasGradientAt f (f' x) x) (h₂ : LipschitzWith l f') : ∀ x y : E, f y ≤ f x + inner ℝ (f' x) (y - x) + l / 2 * ‖y - x‖ ^ 2
route: reduce to FDeriv form via Riesz toDual

nl_statement: For t ≠ 0, the proximal map of f(t • x + a) at x equals (after t-scaling) the proximal map of t^2 • f at t • x + a.
lean_signature: theorem proximal_shift {E} [NACG] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] {x : E} (a : E) {t : ℝ} (tnz : t ≠ 0) (f : E → ℝ) : ∀ z : E, prox_prop (fun u ↦ f (t • u + a)) x z ↔ prox_prop (t ^ 2 • f) (t • x + a) (t • z + a)

nl_statement: For l > 0, prox of (f + l/2 * ‖·-a‖²) at x is the same as prox of (1/(l+1))•f at (1/(l+1))•(x + l•a).
lean_signature: theorem proximal_add_sq {E} [NACG] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] {x : E} (a : E) {l : ℝ} (lpos : 0 < l) (f : E → ℝ) : ∀ z : E, prox_prop (fun u ↦ f u + l / 2 * ‖u - a‖ ^ 2) x z ↔ prox_prop ((1 / (l + 1)) • f) ((1 / (l + 1)) • (x + l • a)) z
route: completing-the-square via aux identity, then linear cancellation

nl_statement: Single deterministic SHB step, treating the iterate pair (xₜ, xₜ₋₁) as state
lean_signature: def shbStep (β η : ℝ) (f' : E → E) (p : E × E) : E × E := (p.1 - η • f' p.1 + β • (p.1 - p.2), p.1)

nl_statement: Stochastic SHB step with explicit additive noise ξ on the gradient slot
lean_signature: def shbStochStep (β η : ℝ) (f' : E → E) (ξ : E) (p : E × E) : E × E := (p.1 - η • (f' p.1 + ξ) + β • (p.1 - p.2), p.1)

nl_statement: Polyak stability region S(L) = {(β,η) : 0 ≤ β < 1, 0 < η ≤ 2(1+β)/L}
lean_signature: def stabilityRegion (L : ℝ) : Set (ℝ × ℝ) := {p | 0 ≤ p.1 ∧ p.1 < 1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ p.2 ≤ 2 * (1 + p.1) / L}

nl_statement: Goujaud cycling-free feasibility region using η·L·(1+β+β²) ≤ 2(1-β²)
Closed-form recurrence x_{t+1} = x_t - η • f'(x_t) + β • (x_t - x_{t-1}) for SHB
lean_signature: theorem shbIter_succ (β η : ℝ) (f' : E → E) (x₀ xPrev : E) (t : ℕ) : shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev (t+1) = shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev t - η • f' (shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev t) + β • (shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev t - shbPrev β η f' x₀ xPrev t)

nl_statement: SHB at β = 0 reduces to plain GD, independent of the seeded prev iterate
lean_signature: theorem shbIter_beta_zero (η : ℝ) (f' : E → E) (x₀ xPrev : E) (t : ℕ) : shbIter (0 : ℝ) η f' x₀ xPrev t = gdIter η f' x₀ t

nl_statement: SHB single-step sufficient decrease for L-smooth f
lean_signature: theorem shb_step_descent {f : E → ℝ} {f' : E → E} {l : NNReal} (h₁ : ∀ x, HasGradientAt f (f' x) x) (h₂ : LipschitzWith l f') (β η : ℝ) (x₀ xPrev : E) (t : ℕ) : f (shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev (t+1)) ≤ f (shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev t) + inner ℝ (f' (shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev t)) (shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev (t+1) - shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev t) + l / 2 * ‖shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev (t+1) - shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev t‖ ^ 2

nl_statement: O(1/T) convergence of fixed-stepsize gradient descent for L-smooth convex objective: ∀ k, f(x_{k+1}) - f(xm) ≤ ‖x_0 - xm‖² / (2 (k+1) a) when a ≤ 1/L.
lean_signature: theorem gradient_method {E} [NACG] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E] {f : E → ℝ} {f' : E → E} {xm x₀ : E} {alg : Gradient_Descent_fix_stepsize f f' x₀} (hfun : ConvexOn ℝ univ f) (step₂ : alg.a ≤ 1 / alg.l) : ∀ k : ℕ, f (alg.x (k + 1)) - f xm ≤ 1 / (2 * (k + 1) * alg.a) * ‖x₀ - xm‖ ^ 2
route: mono-sum + telescope, multi-file Tier-3 reuse of #06 + #07

nl_statement: O(1/T) convergence of proximal gradient on min f+h with f convex L-smooth and h convex: ∀ k ∈ ℕ+, (f+h)(x_k) - (f+h)(xm) ≤ ‖x_0 - xm‖²/(2 k t) when t ≤ 1/L.
lean_signature: theorem proximal_gradient_method_converge {E} [NACG] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E] {f h : E → ℝ} {f' : E → E} {x₀ : E} {alg : proximal_gradient_method f h f' x₀} : ∀ k : ℕ+, f (alg.x k) + h (alg.x k) - f alg.xm - h alg.xm ≤ 1 / (2 * (k : ℝ) * alg.t) * ‖x₀ - alg.xm‖ ^ 2
route: three-point + telescope; bypasses optlib's SubderivAt.add via in-place algebraic combination

nl_statement: Per-step three-point inequality at the extrapolated y_k for proximal gradient: φ(x_{k+1}) ≤ φ(z) + (1/t_k) ⟨y_k - x_{k+1}, x_{k+1} - z⟩ + (1/(2 t_k)) ‖x_{k+1} - y_k‖² for all z.
lean_signature: private lemma phi_three_point_y {E} [NACG] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E] {f h : E → ℝ} {f' : E → E} {x0 : E} {alg : Nesterov_first f h f' x0} (k : ℕ) (z : E) : f (alg.x (k + 1)) + h (alg.x (k + 1)) ≤ f z + h z + (1 / alg.t k) * inner ℝ (alg.y k - alg.x (k + 1)) (alg.x (k + 1) - z) + (1 / (2 * alg.t k)) * ‖alg.x (k + 1) - alg.y k‖ ^ 2
route: item-13 partial: per-step bound at y_k for Nesterov, identical structure to #12's phi_three_point at x_k

nl_statement: O(1/T^2) convergence of Nesterov accelerated proximal gradient on min f+h with f convex L-smooth and h convex: forall k, (f+h)(x_{k+1}) - (f+h)(xm) <= gamma_k^2 / (2 t_k) ||x_0 - xm||^2.
lean_signature: theorem Nesterov_first_converge {E} [NACG] [InnerProductSpace R E] [CompleteSpace E] {f h : E -> R} {f' : E -> E} {x0 : E} {alg : Nesterov_first f h f' x0} {xm : E} (minphi : IsMinOn (f + h) univ xm) : forall k : N, f (alg.x (k + 1)) + h (alg.x (k + 1)) - f xm - h xm <= (alg.gamma k) ^ 2 / (2 * alg.t k) * ||x0 - xm|| ^ 2
route: explicit zSeq Lyapunov: noncomputable def + xkk1_eq_combine + y_eq_combine + per-step + induction; match_scalars closes vector identities
